Yuan Yu иӢ‘еҫЎ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Yu (иӢ‘еҫЎ)was born in Kuaiji. Local leader on the upper Min River between JianвҖҷan and Houguan counties. Destroyed by He Qi.
